ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sector associated with the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., Market Transaction, Direct Business) */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of goods traded (in '000 units) */,
  "rises" INTEGER /* Number of rises in the transaction value */,
  "falls" INTEGER /* Number of falls in the transaction value */,
  "no_change" INTEGER /* Number of transactions with no change in value */,
  "not_traded" INTEGER /* Number of items not traded */,
  "value" REAL /* Total market value of the transactions (in RM '000) */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the transaction value is recorded */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the transaction took place */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., completed, pending, canceled) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the transaction record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the transaction record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_transactions_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_transactions_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_transactions_transaction_type FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_type") REFERENCES transaction_types ("type_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector (e.g., Consumer Products & Services) */,
  "sector_description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  "parent_sector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to a parent sector (for hierarchical sector data) */,
  "sector_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the sector */,
  "sector_url" TEXT /* URL for more detailed information about the sector */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sector record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sector record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the transaction type (e.g., Market Transaction, Direct Business) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the transaction type (e.g., financial, operational) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the transaction type is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting_periods" (
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reporting period */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the reporting period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the reporting period */,
  "period_name" TEXT /* Name of the reporting period (e.g., Q1 2023) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the reporting period is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reporting period was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reporting period was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, manager) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the transaction data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user when accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES market_transactions ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_summary" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each summary record */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sector for which the summary is created */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of transaction */,
  "total_volume" INTEGER /* Total volume of transactions */,
  "average_value" REAL /* Average value of transactions in RM '000 */,
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the reporting period */,
  "total_transactions" INTEGER /* Total number of transactions */,
  "total_rises" INTEGER /* Total number of rises across transactions */,
  "total_falls" INTEGER /* Total number of falls across transactions */,
  "total_no_change" INTEGER /* Total number of transactions with no change */,
  "total_not_traded" INTEGER /* Total number of items not traded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the summary was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the summary was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_summary_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES transaction_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_summary_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_summary_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("period_id") REFERENCES reporting_periods ("period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outcome record */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the transaction */,
  "rises" INTEGER /* Number of transactions resulting in rises */,
  "falls" INTEGER /* Number of transactions resulting in falls */,
  "no_change" INTEGER /* Number of transactions with no change */,
  "not_traded" INTEGER /* Number of items not traded */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the outcome record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the outcome record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the outcome record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the outcome record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_outcomes_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES market_transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)
